testcase.name: testForgotPasswordAlert

failure.message: expected [Please enter your email address] but found [Please enter your email ID]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Please enter your email address] but found [Please enter your email ID] at tests.TestAlert.testForgotPasswordAlert(TestAlert.java:61) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 31 stack frames

testcase.name: testPrivacyPolicy
